diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
[[ "$(basename "$FILE")" != Dockerfile* ]] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
if command -v hadolint >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  ERRORS=$(hadolint "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -10)
  [ -n "$ERRORS" ] && echo "$ERRORS" >&2
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: hadolint is the best linter. Install via brew/apt. LSP provides IDE hover/completion.
